Name: Speech & Communication Assessment
Description: Assess your knowledge of speech therapy techniques and AAC communication strategies to receive personalized course recommendations.
QuestionTexts: Can you use basic articulation techniques to help a student produce clear speech sounds?
Do you understand how to conduct a speech-language screening for students?
Are you familiar with Augmentative and Alternative Communication (AAC) devices?
Can you teach a non-verbal student to communicate using AAC strategies?

Name: Cognitive & Sensory Assessment
Description: Evaluate your understanding of cognitive training methods and sensory integration to guide your learning path.
QuestionTexts: Do you know evidence-based strategies for improving a student's working memory?
Can you design attention and focus training activities for students with cognitive challenges?
Do you understand how sensory processing difficulties affect student behavior?
Are you familiar with sensory diet activities that support student self-regulation?

Name: Assistive Technology & Behavior Assessment
Description: Evaluate your skills in assistive technology tools and positive behavior support strategies.
QuestionTexts: Can you set up and configure screen reader software for a visually impaired student?
Do you know how to evaluate and recommend adaptive devices for students with physical disabilities?
Can you implement a Positive Behavior Support (PBS) plan for a student?
Do you know how to conduct a Functional Behavior Assessment (FBA)?
